title: Chip of the Flying U
writer: Harry Dittmar, Lynn Reynolds, Bertha Muzzy Sinclair
actors: Hoot Gibson, Virginia Brown Faire, Philo McCullough
plot: Chip Bennett of the Flying U Ranch, though a confirmed misogynist, falls in love with Dr. Della Whitmore, the sister of the rancher for whom Chip works. In order to be near her, Chip fakes an accident and claims to have a damaged ...
